CustomField.formula: Number_of_Market_Rate_units__c + Number_of_Low_Mod_Units_at_80__c + Number_of_Low_Mod_Units_at_60__c + Number_of_Low_Mod_Units_at_30__c + Homeless__c + At_Risk_of_Homelessness__c + Domestic_Violence_Sexual_Assault_Traffic__c + Other_as_defined_in_the_NOFA__c
CustomField.label: Total Rental Units planned for this site
